title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: AICodeKing tested a leaked model called Oceanus V1-P (possibly Mythos) across coding, visual reasoning, math, and game tasks. The model achieved perfect scores on the test suite and reportedly outperformed Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and others on complex tasks including web apps, 3D rendering, and game logic.
